question: A car starts from point P on a circular track and an SUV starts from point Q, which is 600 meters ahead of P in the direction of motion. The car's speed is 15 m/s, and the SUV's speed is 10 m/s. The circumference of the track is 1.5 km. How much distance will the car have traveled when it first overtakes the SUV?
A car travels 0.875 km in 1 minute. How far does it travel in 1 hour 45 minutes?
A car covers 40% of a certain distance at a pace of 20 km/h and the remaining distance at a pace of 30 km/h. What is the average speed of the car for the entire journey?

A and B are jogging around a park's circular track which has a perimeter of 1.2 km. They start from the same point at 6:00 a.m. and run in opposite directions. A's speed is 5 km/h, and B's speed is 7 km/h. At what time will they meet for the fifth time?
An airplane travels a specific distance at a speed of 240 km/h over the course of 5 hours. To cover the same distance in just 1 hour, it needs to fly at a speed of:

A person travels from city A to city B. If he travels at a speed of 50 km/h, he arrives 1 hour early. If he travels at a speed of 30 km/h, he arrives 1 hour late. What is the distance (in km) between city A and city B?

A cyclist travels from City A to City B at an average speed of 20 km/h and takes 4 hours. If they want to complete the same journey in 2.5 hours, by what amount (in km/h) should they increase their average speed?

Three friends, X, Y, and Z, are cycling on a circular track with a circumference of 2 km. They all start from the same point at 9:00 a.m. and travel in the same direction with speeds of 10 km/h, 12 km/h, and 15 km/h respectively. How many times will all three of them meet at the starting point if they continue cycling until 1:00 p.m.?
A cyclist has to cover a distance of 80 km. After cycling for 4 hours and 48 minutes, he finds that he has completed th of the total distance. What is his speed in km/h?

A delivery van travels at a constant speed of 60 km/h to cover a certain route in 1 hour and 45 minutes. If traffic increases the time taken by 15 minutes, by what percentage must the van's average speed decrease to complete the route?

A student walks from his home to school at a speed of 4 km/h and reaches 15 minutes late. If he increases his speed to 6 km/h, he reaches 5 minutes early. What is the distance (in km) from his home to school?
The ratio of the speeds of a car and a bus is 3 : 4. If the bus covers a distance of 320 km in 4 hours, what is the speed of the car in km/h?

A thief and a police officer are 500 meters apart. If they run in the same direction, the police officer catches the thief in 10 minutes. If they run towards each other, they meet in 2 minutes. What is the speed of the thief in meters per minute?
A car runs 18.4 km using 2 ½ liters of petrol. What is the mileage in km per liter (rounded to 2 decimals)?

The speeds of two motorcyclists are in the ratio 5 : 3. If the slower motorcyclist has a 24 km head start, and his speed is 12 km/h, how far (in km) will the faster motorcyclist travel to overtake him?
Sachin covers half of his journey at 12 km/h and the remaining half at 3 km/h. His average speed is:
A car travels 13.5 km using 1.8 liters of fuel. How many kilometers does it travel per liter?
A man covered a certain distance in 3 parts with average speeds of 30 km/h, 60 km/h, and 90 km/h. What is his average speed over the entire journey, assuming equal distances?
Manoj crosses a 500 m long street in 5 minutes. What is his speed in km per hour?
An athlete runs a 300-meter race in 24 seconds. How much is his speed in km/h?
A runner completes 7.2 km in 48 minutes. What is his speed in km/h?
Ajay and Vijay start from the same point and walk at 4 km/h and 5 km/h respectively, in the same direction. What will be the distance between them after 2 hours?
An athlete runs a 300-meter race in 25 seconds. His speed in km/h is:
Ramesh walks at 5 km/h for 6 km and 6 km/h for 8 km. What is his average speed?
Dhanush crosses a road 100 metres wide in 50 seconds. His speed in km/hr is:
A man reduces his speed from 20 kmph to 18 kmph. So, he takes 8 minutes more than the normal time. What is the distance traveled by him?
Dhiraj goes to his school from his house at a speed of 3.8 km/hr and returns at 2.6 km/ hr. If he takes 5 hours going and coming, the distance between his house and school is:
Jayesh covers one-fourth of his journey at 20 km/h, another one-fourth at 10 km/h, and the rest at 70 km/h. What is his average speed?
A car traveling at a speed of 50 km/hour can complete a journey in 8 hours. How long will it take to travel the same distance at 40 km/hour?
The time taken to cover 132 km by car is 1 hour. Find the time taken to cover 88 km by car.
Suman and Sujata travel the same distance at speeds of 10 km/hr and 12 km/hr respectively. If Suman takes 36 minutes more than Sujata, the distance traveled by each is:
A person crosses a 700 m long street in 5 minutes. What is his speed in km per hour?
Sahil travelled a certain distance by bike at the rate of 25 kmph. And walked back at the rate of 4 kmph. If the whole journey took 5 hours 48 minutes, what was the distance?
Suraj travels at a speed of 30 kmph. Find the distance covered by him in 72 seconds.
A car covers three equal distances at speeds of 30 km/h, 45 km/h, and 90 km/h, respectively. What is the average speed of the car for the entire journey?
A truck travels to a town at 30 km/h and returns at 20 km/h. If the total time taken is 5 hours, what is the one-way distance to the town? [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 12 Nov Shift 3]

A thief escapes from a bank at 10:00 AM at a speed of 20 km/h. A police car starts chasing him at 10:30 AM at a speed of 30 km/h. At what time will the police car catch the thief? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 13 Nov 2025, Shift-2]
Ravi goes to school at a speed of 5 km/h and returns home at 3 km/h. If the total time taken is 2 hours, what is the distance between his home and school?
A car travels at a constant speed. It covers of a journey in 2 hours. How long will it take to cover the remaining journey?

A thief escapes from a bank at 10:00 AM at a speed of 20 km/h. A police car starts chasing him at 10:30 AM at a speed of 30 km/h. At what time will the police car catch the thief? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 13 Nov 2025, Shift-2]

A man can walk up a moving-up escalator in 30 seconds. The same man can walk down the same moving-up escalator in 90 seconds. How long would it take him to walk up the escalator when it is not moving?
A boy cycles to the park at 8 km/h and comes back at 4 km/h. If the total time taken is 1.5 hours, find the distance between his home and the park.

A person travels a total distance of 480 km, partly by car at a speed of 80 km/h and the rest by bike at 40 km/h. If 75% of the total distance is covered by car, find the approximate average speed of the entire journey.

A motorist travels from City P to City Q, a distance of 234 km. For the first 78 km, he drives at 52 km/h. For the next 78 km he drives at 39 km/h. For the remaining distance, he drives at x km/h (constant). His overall average speed for the whole trip is 46.8 km/h. What is x?
A thief is 2,000 metres ahead of a policeman when the policeman starts a chase by running at 20 m/s. If the thief is running at 12 m/s, then find the time taken by the policeman to catch the thief.

A bus travels a distance of 180 km in 6 hours. The speed of a car is 20% more than that of the bus, and the speed of a bike is 25% more than that of the car. Find the difference between the time (in minutes) taken by the bike and the car to travel 50% more distance than travelled by the bus.
A flight covers 1,200 km in 2 hours. By what percent should its speed be decreased to cover the same distance in 3 hours?

A bike is chasing a car, which is 12 km ahead of it. The speeds of the bike and the car are 96 km/hr and 60 km/hr, respectively. If the bike catches the car in 'a' minutes, then find the distance covered by the bike in (a - 16) hours.
A bus starts 30 minutes late and to reach its destination 150 km away on time, it increases its speed by 25 km/h. What is the usual speed of the bus?
A cyclist rides at a speed of 30 km/h and covers a distance of 90 km. Then, he increases his speed by 20% and covers another 60 km. What is the total time taken for the journey?
Ravi and Raj are running a 200-meter race. Ravi completes it in 25 seconds, while Raj takes 30 seconds. By what distance will Ravi beat Raj?
A cyclist covers a total distance of 36 km. After cycling for 2 hours and 30 minutes, he finds that the distance he has covered is 3/5 of the remaining distance. What is his speed in km/hr?

Two friends, 'A' and 'B' started running along a circular track in the same direction at the same time at 35 m/s and 21 m/s, respectively. If the length of the circular track is 3,500 metres, then find the time after the start at which they will meet each other for the first time.
A person walks at 5 km/h. If he increases his speed to 8 km/h, he takes 30 minutes less to cover a distance. What is the distance?
A car and a bus travel at speeds in the ratio of 5:3. The bus covers a distance of 360 km in 6 hours. What is the time taken by the car to cover the same distance?
A dog starts chasing a rabbit that is 200 meters away. The dog runs at 25 m/s, and the rabbit runs at 20 m/s. How far will the rabbit have run before the dog catches it?
How far will a bus travel in 4 hours at 55 km/h?

Two buses start from two different cities that are 300 km apart and travel towards each other. The first bus's speed is 50 km/h, and the second bus's speed is 70 km/h. What is the time taken for them to meet?
A man walks 3 km at 4 km/h, 3 km at 6 km/h. Find average speed.

A and B are jogging around a 2 km circular track. They start from the same point and run in opposite directions. A's speed is 8 km/h and B's speed is 12 km/h. At what time will they meet for the tenth time if they start at 7:00 a.m.?
A person covers some distance by car, travelling at 45 km/h in 4.6 hours, and the remaining distance by bus, travelling at 37.5 km/h in 4.2 hours. Find the total distance travelled by the person.
A man travels 120 km at 40 km/h and returns the same distance at 60 km/h. What is his average speed for the whole journey?

Two cars, one from City M and another from City N, which are 450 km apart, start moving towards each other. The first car travels at a speed of 50 km/h, and the second car travels at a speed of 40 km/h. If they start at the same time, how far from City M will they meet?

A policeman started following a thief who was 1,200 metres ahead of him. The thief is running at 2.5 km/h, while the speed of the policeman is 3.75 km/h. Find the distance covered by the thief in metres just when he was caught.
A person covers a certain distance in 2 hours. If he had moved 5 km/h faster, he would have taken 30 minutes less. Find the original speed.

A car moves at a steady pace from point P to point Q. It would have taken an hour less if it had accelerated by 10 km/h. It would have saved an additional forty-five minutes if its speed had been increased by an additional ten kilometers per hour. How far are P and Q apart?
If a car reduces its speed by 10 km/h, it takes 1 hour more for a journey of 300 km. Find original speed.

Two runners, A and B, start from the same point on a circular track of 400 m. They run in the same direction with speeds of 10 m/s and 7 m/s, respectively. How many times will they cross each other in 15 minutes?
A car travels 150 km at 75 km/h. Time taken?
A bus travels at 50 km/h. How long to cover 300 km?
Man walks 10 km in 2 hours. Speed?

A policeman spotted a thief at a distance of 1,500 metres and he immediately started chasing him at 20 km/h. The thief spotted the policeman at the same time and immediately started running away from him at 15 km/h. How far will the thief run before he gets caught?
The ratio of the speeds of a bike and a car is 4:5. If the bike travels 160 km in 4 hours, how far will the car travel in 5 hours? [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 12 Nov Shift 2]
Amir goes to his college from his house at a speed of 4 km/hr and returns at a speed of 2 km/hr. If he takes 4 hours to go and come, find the distance between his house and school.
The speeds of A and B are in the ratio 4:7. A takes 30 minutes more than B to reach a destination. Time in which A reach the destination?
A man walking at 6 km/h reaches the market in 40 minutes. If he walks at 4 km/h, how long will he take to reach the market?
A jeep covers a distance of 180 km at a certain speed. If the speed is increased by 15 km/h, it takes 1 hour less. Find the original speed.
A man walks at a speed of √x km/hr. After 2 hours, he has covered the same number of kilometers as the value of x. What is the value of x?
A person cycles for 5 hours at an average speed of 12 km/h. How far does he travel?
The speed ratio of a car to a bus is 3:2. if the car covers 180 km in 3 hours, how far does the bus travel in 2 hours?
A person walks at a speed of 90 m per minute. How much time will he take to walk 2.7 km?
A bicycle covers a distance of 180 km in 15 hours. The speed of a moped is 250% of the speed of the bicycle. How much distance will the moped cover in hours?
Two friends start 24 km apart, walking towards each other. One walks at 4 km/h, the other at 8 km/h. After how many hours will they meet?
A car travelling at 48 km/h covers a certain distance in 50 minutes. If the same distance is covered at 60 km/h, how long will it take?
A man drives 2 hours at 30 km/h and then 3 hours at 40 km/h. What total distance does he cover?
A cyclist travels 30 km in 2 hours. How long will it take him to cover 75 km at the same speed?
A man walks 1 km in 15 minutes. What is his speed in km/h?
A man walking to work is 5 minutes late if he walks at 5 km/h and 5 minutes early if he walks at 6 km/h. What is the distance from his home to work?
A car moves at 25 km/h for a 100 km journey. How long will it take?
A car runs at 54 km/h. How many metres will it cover in 20 seconds?
Aman walks 10 km in 2 hours. How long will he take to walk 25 km at the same pace?
A car runs at a speed of 20 m/s for 2 minutes. How much distance does it cover?
A boy walks 9 km in 3 hours. Find his speed in km/h.
Two runners, A and B, run at speeds in the ratio 2:3. If A covers 200 m in 40 seconds, how long will B take to cover the same distance?
A car covers 60 km in 1.5 hours. Calculate its average speed.
A boy jogs at 6 km/h. How far will he run in 2.5 hours?
A cycle is ridden at 12 km/h. How much time will it take to cover 18 km?
A cyclist rides 12 km in 40 minutes. What is his speed in km/h?
A train travels at 45 km/h. H ow long will it take to cover 90 km to the next station?
A sprinter runs at 10 m/s. What is his speed in km/h?
A car travels 180 km from Town X to Town Y in 3 hours. What is its average speed?
A bus moves at 50 km/h. How long will it take to cover 150 km?
A cyclist rides 24 km in 2 hours. How long will it take him to travel 60 km at the same speed?
A bicycle moves at 12 km/h. How much distance will it cover in 40 minutes?
A person jogs 9 km in 1.5 hours. Calculate his speed in km/h.
A man travels 150 km: first 75 km at 25 km/h, remaining 75 km at 50 km/h. Find total travel time.
A runner completes 100 m in 12 seconds. What is his speed in km/h?
A man walks at 3 km/h for 4 hours. Calculate the distance he covers.
Ravi walks at a speed of 5 km/h. How long will it take him to cover 15 km to reach his friend's house?
A boy runs at a constant speed of 10 km/h. How much time will he take to cover 2.5 km?
The ratio of the speeds of two aeroplane is 11: 18. If the first aeroplane covers a distance of 1650 km in 3 hours, what is the speed of the second aeroplane (in m/sec)?
A truck travels 64 km in 2 hours. How far can it go in 5 hours at the same speed?
A train moves at 36 km/h. How long will it take to cover 72 km?
A man walks at 4 km/h. How long will it take him to cover 10 km?
A bike covers 150 m in 10 seconds. What is its speed in km/h?
Rahul alternates between walking and cycling. He walks 1 km in 10 minutes and cycles 1 km in 5 minutes. If he cycles half of a 12 km trip and walks the other half, how long will the trip take?
A train covers 100 km in 2 hours and 30 minutes. What is its speed in km/h?
A runner completes 100 m in 20 seconds. What is his speed in km/h?
Two bikers start from points 180 km apart and ride towards each other at 20 km/h and 25 km/h, respectively. After how much time will they meet?
A horse gallops at 10 km/h. How far will it travel in 36 minutes?
A sprinter completes 100m in 12 seconds. What is his speed in km/h ?
A person walks 8 km in 2 hours. How far can he walk in 5 hours at the same pace?
The speed of a bus is 150% of the speed of a car. The car covers a distance of 600 km in 10 hours. How much distance will the bus cover in 4 hours?
A bus travels at 50 km/h. How long will it take to cover 200 km?
Two cars have a speed ratio of 5:7. If the slower car travels 300 km in 5 hours, find the speed of the faster car.
A girl goes jogging every morning at a steady pace of 5 km/h. How much distance will she cover in 2 hours?

A logistics van leaves Jaipur at 5:00 a.m. and reaches Agra at 9:00 a.m. Another delivery van leaves Agra at 7:00 a.m. and reaches Jaipur at 10:30 a.m. At what time do the two vans cross each other on the highway?
A man covers a certain distance in 6 hours at 75 km/h. If he wants to cover the same distance in 5 hours, what should be his speed?

Sarah walks to the park at a speed of  km/h. She spends minutes at the park and then walks back home along the same path at the same speed. If the total time she was out is hours, how far is the park from her home?

15 . ./ 540 . . 225 . . 540 . . एक कार कि मी घंटा की गति से कि मी तथा कि मी की दो दूरियाँ तय करती है। कि मी तथा 225 . . ( ) ? कि मी की दूरी तय करने में लगने वाले समय के बीच क्या अंतर घंटों में है En: A car cover two distances 540 km and 225 km at the speed of 15 km/hr. What is the difference between the time (in hours) taken to cover 540 km and 225 km?
A boy runs at the speed of . He crosses a bridge in 8 minutes. What is the length (in metres) of the bridge?
A bus travels for 10 hours at the speed of . A train travels 100 km more than the bus in 5 hours more time. What is the speed (in ) of the train?
A car is moving at a speed of . What will be the speed of the car in ?
A car is moving at a speed of . What will be the speed of the car in m/s?

G travels from P to Q. H travels from Q to P. They start travelling at the same time. Distance between P and Q is 390 km. They meet at point S after 3 hours. Speed of G is . What is the speed (in ) of H?
270 . ./ ./ . ? एक कार कि मी घंटा की गति से चल रही है। कार की गति मी से में क्या होगी En: A car is moving at a speed of 270 km/hr. What will be the speed of the car in m/s?
A train is moving at a speed of . What will be the speed of this train in ?

A started from point P to reach point Q at the speed of . At the same time, B started from point Q to reach point P at the speed of . They met in between at point S. What is the ratio of distances covered by A and B to reach point S?
The speeds of A and B are 14 km/hr and 38 km/hr respectively. What will be the ratio of the time taken by them to cover the same distance?

G travels from P to Q. H travels from Q to P. They start their journeys simultaneously. The distance between P and Q is 500 km. They meet at a point after 5 hours. The speed of G is 60 km/hr. What will be the speed of H (in km/hr)?
Speed of A and B is and respectively. What will be the ratio of time taken by them to complete the same distance?
S travels with 60 percent of his usual speed and reaches his home 18 minutes late. What is the usual time (in minutes) taken by him to reach home?
A car covers a distance of 48 km in 72 minutes. If its speed is decreased by , then what will be the time (in minutes) taken by it to cover the same distance?
Speed of A and B is and respectively. What will be the ratio of time taken by them to complete the same distance?

A started from point P to reach point Q at the speed of . At the same time, B started from point Q to reach point P at the speed of . They met in between at point S. What is the ratio of distances covered by A and B to reach point S?
The speeds of A and B are 50 km/h and 30 m/s respectively. What is the ratio of the distances covered by them in one hour?
A car covers two distances of 36 km and 42 km in total 6 hours. Car covered both the distances at the same speed. What is the speed (in km/hr) of the car?
A car is moving at a speed of 216 km/hr. What will be the speed of the car in m/s?
S travels with 40 percent of his usual speed and reaches his home 15 minutes late. What is the usual time (in minutes) taken by him to reach home?
A boy runs at the speed of 54 km/hr. He crosses a bridge in 6 minutes. What is the length (in metres) of the bridge?
A man covers a certain distance in 4 hours 30 minutes walking at a speed of 8 km/hr. If he covers the same distance by bicycle in 4 hours, then what is the speed of the bicycle (in km/hr)?
A car covers two distances of 143 km and 77 km at a speed of 11 km/h. What is the difference (in hours) between the time taken to cover the distances of 143 km and 77 km?
A car travels 80 km at 40 km/h, 120 km at 60 km/h, and 100 km at 50 km/h. Find the average speed.
A man walks from his home to a park at 4 km/h and returns along the same route at 6 km/h. If the total time taken for the entire trip is 1 hour. Find the distance between his home and the park.

Two cyclists start toward each other from towns A and B, which are 150 km apart. Cyclist A leaves A at 6:00 a.m. with a speed of 20 km/h. Cyclist B leaves B at 7:00 a.m. and they meet at 9:00 a.m. Find the speed of cyclist B (in km/h), rounded to two decimals.
A car travels 60 km at x km/h, 90 km at y km/h, 120 km at z km/h. If average speed = 60 km/h, x = 30 km/h, y = 45 km/h, find z.
A car travels 60 km at 30 km/h, 90 km at 45 km/h, 150 km at z km/h. If average speed = 60 km/h, find z.
Two cars start from the same point at the same time, moving in the same direction. The first car travels at 60 km/h, and the second car at 90 km/h. After how much time will they be 45 km apart?

Two cyclists start at the same time from towns A and B, which are 210 km apart, and travel towards each other. The cyclist from A rides at 28 km/h, and the cyclist from B rides at 32 km/h. Find the time (in hours) taken by the cyclist from B to reach town A after meeting.

Two cyclists start from two towns, A and B, which are 180 km apart, and move towards each other. The cyclist from A rides at 40 km/h, while the cyclist from B rides at 50 km/h. However, the cyclist from A starts 45 minutes earlier. Find the time (in hours, rounded to two decimals) after A's start when they meet.

A car travels at a speed of 80 km/hr and covers a particular distance in 4 hour 30 minutes. How much time (in hours) another car travelling at the speed of 30 km/hr will take to cover the same distance?

Two swimmers start from opposite ends of a 720 m long river pool and swim towards each other. Swimmer A swims at 48 m/min, while Swimmer B swims at 60 m/min. However, Swimmer A starts 5 minutes earlier. At what time after A's start will they meet? (Round to two decimal places if needed)

A postal runner on foot leaves Post Office A at 6:00 a.m. toward Post Office B at a steady speed of 6 km/h. A scooter departs from Post Office B toward A at 7:30 a.m. at a speed of 42 km/h. The distance between A and B is 210 km. At what clock time will they meet? (Round minutes and seconds to the nearest second)
A car travels from A to B at the speed of 40 km/hr and travels from B to A at speed of 60 km/hr. What is the average speed (in km/hr) of the car?
A car travels three equal distances at the speed of 10 km/hr, 20 km/hr and 30 km/hr respectively. What is the average speed (in km/hr) for this journey?

Two courier drones start from two different stations, X and Y, which are 240 km apart. Drone A leaves station X at 7:00 a.m. at a speed of 60 km/h. Drone B leaves station Y at 7:45 a.m. at a speed of 80 km/h. At what time will the two drones meet? (Round to two decimal places if required)
A car travels three equal distances at the speed of 10 km/hr, 15 km/hr and 40 km/hr respectively. What is the average speed (in km/hr) for this journey?

A car leaves town A for town B (distance 320 km) at 7:00 a.m. with a speed of 64 km/h. A truck leaves town B for A 30 minutes later and travels at 56 km/h. At what time (clock) do they meet, and how far from A is the meeting point? (Round decimal values to two places)

R travels from A to B. P travels from B to A. Distance between A and B is 400 km. Speed of R is 40 km/hr. Speed of P is 60 km/hr. They started travelling at the same time. After how many hours they will meet?

Two towns are 260 km apart. A car leaves town A at 6:00 a.m. and travels toward B at 60 km/h. A truck travels from town B toward A at 50 km/h and meets the car at 10:00 a.m. At what time did the truck leave town B?

A car travels at a speed of 100 km/hr and covers a particular distance in 2 hour 30 minutes. How much time (in hours) another car travelling at the speed of 50 km/hr will take to cover the same distance?
A car cover two distances 135 km and 60 km at the speed of 15 km/hr. What is the difference between the time (in hours) taken to cover 135 km and 60 km?
A car travels from A to B at the speed of 10 km/hr and travels from B to A at speed of 20 km/hr. What is the average speed (in km/hr) of the car?
The speed of a car is 70 km/hr for first 7 hours and 60 km/hr for the next 5 hours. What is the total distance (in km) covered by the car?
A man travelled for first 5 hours at the speed of 20 km/hr. He travelled for next 3 hours at the speed of 10 km/hr. What is his average speed (in km/hr) for the whole journey?

A large ship consumes 0.2 liters of fuel per km, and a smaller ship consumes 0.15 liters per km. If the large ship travels 500 km and the small ship travels 400 km, what is the total fuel cost at a rate of Rs110 per liter?
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (Graduate), 25 Jul 2025, Shift 3

question: Two ships take different routes to reach the "spice capital of the world". The Distances travelled by the two ships are in the ratio of 3:2. Ship 1 moves at 40kmph, and ship 2 travels at 60kmph. If the two ships arrived at their destination with a Time gap of 1 hour, what is the distance travelled by both ships together?
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (Graduate), 28 Jul 2025, Shift 3

question: A bus starts from City A at 1:00 PM, and travels towards City B at a speed of 50 km/h. A car starts from City B at 2:30 PM and travels towards City A at a speed of 80 km/h. If the distance between City A and City B is 450 km, at what time will they cross each other?
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (Graduate), 29 Aug 2025, Shift 1

question: Two runners, P and Q, start running from the same point on a circular track of 800 meters. They run in the same direction with speeds of 12 km/h and 9 km/h, respectively. If they run for 4 hours, how many times will they cross each other?
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (Graduate), 29 Aug 2025, Shift 1

question: A police car detects a stolen vehicle 1 km in front of it and begins to pursue it. The police car is moving at a speed of 100 km/h, while the stolen car is traveling at 80 km/h. What will be the distance between them after 90 seconds?
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (Graduate), 30 Jul 2025, Shift 3

question: A car starts a 360 km journey with a full tank. For the first 150 km, it travels at 60 km/h. Due to fuel reduction, the speed drops by 10 km/h for the next 120 km. For the remaining journey, it further slows by 10 km/h. Estimate the average speed for the whole journey.
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (12th), 02 Aug 2025, Shift 2

question: A bike rider travels 30 kilometers at a velocity of 5 km/h and then comes back along the same path at 6 km/h. What is the cyclist's average speed for the entire trip?
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (12th), 02 Aug 2025, Shift 2

question: If a person walks at 5 km/h, he misses a train by 7 minutes. If he walks at 6 km/h, he reaches the station 5 minutes early. Find the distance to the station.
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (12th), 26 Jul 2025, Shift 2

question: A car travels from A to B at 80 km/h and returns at 60 km/h. Find the approx. average speed of the car.
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (12th), 28 Jul 2025, Shift 2

question: Two cars start simultaneously from the same point, one traveling east at 50 km/h and the other travelling north at 70km / h. How far apart are they after 2 hours?
source: Selection Post Phase XIV (12th), 29 Aug 2025, Shift 2
